labeling.method: transcript-window matching (+/-3s, >=2 tokens, >=60% hit) with a caption band verified from the frame
labeling.why_this_cell: Added specifically to FALSIFY the position rule proposed in P-C2-BASELINE: its captions sit at y~0.4 (ABOVE centre), not lower-third, so a y>=0.55 rule must score recall 0 here.
honesty: Caption band frame-verified at t=1 ('SAMSUNG DEBATE IS', karaoke highlight, y~0.38).
The y<0.30 cluster is text inside pasted product images (phone renders), not creator captions.
The y~0.5 cluster is price/model text inside those same cards.

why: product comparison images pasted above the caption band
